name: YesAndSkylight
note: Private family tool. Off the public site and status dashboard by DESIGN D9. This data file exists for the bar-raise / constellation tooling only; it is not linked from any public surface.

barRaise.topFinding: The HIGH runtime bug that set last week's verdict is genuinely fixed. src/dates.ts now carries the wall-clock semantics explicitly, normDate() passes a naive datetime-local string through verbatim, and google.ts sends it beside a timeZone field, so a 4pm entry from the phone form lands at 4pm Eastern. The all-day exclusive-end bug is closed the same way via nextDay(). What replaces it is not breakage but exposure: event creation is non-idempotent in all three front doors (src/google.ts:115, src/skylight.ts:159), and the only guard is a client-side disabled button at src/ui.ts:115, so a retried POST, a re-delivered email, or a curl retry silently doubles a calendar entry. Alongside that, the pure date functions that shipped a bug last month still have zero tests. The project works; it is under-instrumented against the next regression rather than currently broken, which is why the verdict moves from needs-attention to in-progress.

actions.title: Add a vitest suite over normDate/epochOf/addHour/nextDay/fmtWhen and extractJson, and wire it into release.ps1 beside the typecheck.
Add a scheduled smoke probe that exercises one write per Skylight entity type and alerts on a 4xx.
Derive a deterministic event id from summary plus startsAt, pass it as Google's client-supplied id, and treat 409 as success.
Treat an unset or empty ALLOWED_SENDERS as reject-all rather than skipping the allowlist check.
Add a console.error in the index.ts fetch catch carrying pathname and error message, never the request body.
Extract the client script from ui.ts template literals into a typechecked source file and dedupe esc().
Define one canonical event-input type and give both drivers a uniform createEvent signature.
Retry the Google events POST once on a 401 or 403 after re-minting the cached token.
Treat a 2xx write with an unreadable response body as success rather than throwing.
Wrap the whole email handler in a try/catch that logs and best-effort writes a KV entry.
Fold a downstream check into /api/health, or point an external uptime probe at /api/setup.
Record processed Message-IDs in a short-TTL KV set and skip duplicates.
Redirect to sign-in on a 401 from /api/state or /api/quick-add instead of showing raw unauthorized.
Bump wrangler to ^4.x, regenerate the lockfile, and smoke-test a deploy.
Normalise both endpoints to one time frame before the start/end comparison, or reject a mixed pair.

deferred.reason: already queued by the 2026-07-02 canonical audit (S1)

deferred.title: Move the GCP service-account key from the repo root to X:\.secrets\Skylight.
Gate inbound mail on a DMARC pass before honouring the From-based allowlist.
deferred.reason: post-1.0; Email Routing filters upstream and the attacker needs both an allowed address and the private inbound address

deferred.title: Confirm SKYLIGHT_FRAME_ID via a live GET /api/setup, then set it or degrade the List/Chore/Task tabs.
deferred.reason: already queued (canonical-audit-2026-07-10 frame-id); needs a live probe with credentials
